hero.subtitle: AI & data science engineer with deep OT roots — building intelligent systems that actually work on the factory floor. Where most engineers choose one side, I bring both: software fluency and real-world manufacturing context.

about.label: About
about.title:
Where hardware
meets intelligence.
about.desc: I'm Michael — an engineer with an interdisciplinary background spanning mechanical engineering and computer science. I practically apply AI technology and data science on manufacturing floors, with a passion for bridging the gap between hardware principles and software development to solve complex production line challenges.
about.stat1: Years of industry experience in manufacturing
about.stat2: Manpower reduction achieved on pilot production lines
about.stat3: TWD annual cost savings through process optimization
about.stat4: Reduction in new staff training time via SOP standardization

skills.label: Skills
skills.title: Built to ship.
skills.desc: A full-stack AI engineering toolkit — from data pipelines to model deployment, from the shop floor to the cloud.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Real-world impact.
experience.desc: Delivering measurable results at Taiwan's largest bearing manufacturer through AI, data science, and process engineering.

job1.company: TPI Tung Pei Industrial — Manufacturing & Process Engineer
job1.b1: Plant-wide visual inspection (AOI+AI): Led implementation from hardware spec definition, model parameter tuning (YOLO), to SOP standardization. Successfully reduced manpower by 25% on two pilot production lines.
job1.b2: Cross-border project management (FAT): Conducted 3 overseas factory acceptance tests in Hangzhou to verify mechanical stability and AI model integration performance.

job2.company: TPI Tung Pei Industrial — Manufacturing & Process Engineer
job2.b1: A/B Testing for process optimization: Validated single-machine vs multi-machine cleaning processes through statistical hypothesis testing. Removed redundant cleaning step, saving NT$2.2M annually.
job2.b2: IoT & predictive maintenance: Led digital transformation of cleaning equipment, implemented data visualization on HMI, and planned MES dashboards for advanced process analysis.

job3.company: TPI Tung Pei Industrial — Manufacturing & Process Engineer
job3.b1: Bearing vibration defect classifier: Developed multi-feature fusion time-series AI models using Random Forest, DEA, Wavelet, and FFT for automated quality inspection.
job3.b2: Corporate RAG knowledge base (PoC): Built an internal AI assistant from scratch with Python, LangChain, and FastAPI. Introduced Chinese-optimized embedding model for local language processing.

job4.company: TPI Tung Pei Industrial — Manufacturing & Process Engineer
job4.b1: SOP standardization: Pioneered plant-wide graphical SOP operation manuals, reducing new staff training time by 67% (3 months → 1 month).

projects.label: Projects & Awards
projects.title: Beyond the day job.
projects.desc: Competitions, research, and side projects that push the boundaries.

p1.title: AI CUP 2024 — RAG & LLM in Financial Q&A
p1.desc: Built a hybrid retrieval pipeline (BM25 + FAISS vector search) with custom Word2Vec training, OCR preprocessing, LangChain orchestration, multi-dimensional reranking, and Dockerized deployment for E.SUN's open financial Q&A challenge.

p2.title: MNIST Diffusion Model (DDPM from Scratch)
p2.desc: Implemented Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) with a custom lightweight U-Net featuring sinusoidal timestep embeddings and FiLM conditioning. Achieved FID ≈ 7.85 on MNIST generation. Fully containerized with Docker.

p3.title: Brain-to-Text Neural Decoding — Architecture Experiment
p3.desc: Modified a Kaggle competition baseline (NEJM 2024 brain-to-text challenge) by replacing the LSTM decoder with a GRU architecture — including orthogonal weight init for hidden-hidden weights and learnable initial hidden states — and adding self-attention masking for variable-length EEG sequences (512-ch, 20ms bins).

p4.title: CDAF Autofocus Algorithm — Focus Metric Study
p4.desc: Implemented and compared three contrast-based autofocus metrics (Std, Sobel, Laplacian variance) with ROI-based scoring on multi-focus images — the same principle behind industrial machine vision cameras used in AOI systems.

p5.title: Surface Defect Detection via Photometric Stereo + YOLO
p5.desc: Master's thesis optimizing image recognition algorithms to overcome detection bottlenecks for specific defect categories on bearing surfaces, improving model coverage.

p6.title: NVIDIA Jetson Nano — Hand Gesture Classification
p6.desc: Built a real-time hand gesture classification system using ResNet-18 on the Jetson Nano for edge computing applications including hands-free control and accessibility tools.

p7.title: FTC Australia — Top 18 Worldwide
p7.desc: Led the mechanical design for an international robot competition. Responsible for the full product lifecycle from concept to conventional machining, CAD modeling, and 3D printing.

p8.title: IoT Smart Home — Bachelor's Thesis (1st Place)
p8.desc: Integrated Raspberry Pi and Node-RED for hardware-software interfacing, implementing servo access control, real-time video streaming, and automated lighting with a remote dashboard.

p9.title: Yuan Ze University — Maker Competition
p9.desc: Outstanding Award in the Smart Living group at the 2020 university-wide Maker Competition.

volunteer.label: Volunteer
volunteer.title: Commitment in action.
volunteer.desc: Two international volunteer services that strengthened planning, communication, and ownership in unfamiliar environments.
volunteer.photo_caption: Volunteer experience — community program support and cross-cultural collaboration.

v1.b1: Took initiative to join two international volunteer trips during the summer break.
v1.b2: Coordinated local activities, supported team execution, and communicated stories and messages across diverse participants — building comfort with ambiguity and fast-changing constraints.
v1.b3: Reinforced an operating style of empathy, commitment, and pragmatic problem-solving — the same traits required for cross-functional factory rollouts.

education.label: Education
education.title: From gears to GPUs.
education.desc: A dual foundation in mechanical engineering and computer science.

e1.thesis: Thesis: Surface Defect Detection of Bearings Based on Photometric Stereo Combined with YOLO — optimizing image recognition to overcome detection bottlenecks for specific defect categories.

e2.thesis: Thesis: IoT Smart Home — integrated Raspberry Pi and Node-RED for hardware-software interfacing, implementing servo motor access control and real-time video streaming. Won 1st Place.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title:
Let's build
something that ships.
contact.desc: Open to AI Engineer, Data Scientist, and ML Engineer roles — especially where IT meets OT. If you're building industrial AI, smart manufacturing systems, or data-driven production tools, I bring both the engineering chops and the factory-floor context to make it real.
